stemHtml: The crew of a jet transport aircraft is preparing for departure from one of two available runways, one runway is reported as contaminated and the other is reported as wet. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: A derated thrust takeoff is only allowed on the wet runway.
options.b: A derated thrust takeoff is allowed on both runways.
options.c: A reduced thrust takeoff is only allowed on the contaminated runway.
options.d: A reduced thrust takeoff is allowed on either runway.
